## Summary

- What problem does this change solve?
- What is the chosen technical approach?

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run check:wp00`
- [ ] `npm run check:repo`
- [ ] `npm test` (when applicable)

## Documentation

- [ ] README or docs updated for behavior, architecture, or workflow changes

## Visual Evidence

- [ ] Screenshots or recordings attached for UI changes
